audience_shift.from: A community band room is an exciting but fuzzy dream.
audience_shift.to: Chleo can pursue it through a staged Singapore launch: validate demand, confirm site use, quote the room, then build one disciplined studio.

throughline: Do not start by renting a room; start by proving customers, permission, room economics and operating standards.

beats.transition: Move from dream to a launch boundary that avoids public-venue risk.
Show that the wedge is trust, then define how interviews become real demand evidence.
Make location, use class, landlord consent and public-showcase risk explicit before discussing fitout.
Translate the idea into acoustic layers, a starter buy sheet, quote categories, startup cash and break-even pressure.
Close with the culture standard, 90-day evidence plan and go/no-go gate.
Use appendices when the audience asks for gear detail, vendor contacts or cost breakdown.
